_note: EXAMPLE SEED — synthetic rows so the pipeline + UI render end-to-end. Replace with verified entries before drawing conclusions.
_how_to_refresh: Curate from public investigations: KSE Institute Russian Oil Tracker (https://kse.ua/russian-oil-tracker/), CREA shadow-fleet trackers (https://energyandcleanair.org/), United Against Nuclear Iran tanker tracker (https://www.unitedagainstnucleariran.com/), OCCRP. Map each named vessel to its IMO. Re-run: bun run load-cases <path>.
_schema: cases[]: { id(slug), title, summary, source, source_url, published_on(YYYY-MM-DD), tags[], imos[] }
